name: RMW - MG3
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - Despite the amounts of allied troopers mowed down with its predecessor, NATO found the MG3 fascinating. Its basically still an MG42 but uses NATO ammo and replaced the Wood furtniture. Has been used by the Bundeswehr ever since. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
